questions.question: Design a 2:1 multiplexer using Verilog. The inputs are A, B, Select (S), and Output (Y).
questions.hint: Use the following inputs and output: A, B, S, Y

questions.question: Design a 3:1 multiplexer using Verilog. The inputs are A, B, C, Select (S), and Output (Y).
questions.hint: Use the following inputs and output: A, B, C, S, Y

questions.question: Design a 4:1 multiplexer using Verilog. The inputs are A, B, C, D, Select (S), and Output (Y).
questions.hint: Use the following inputs and output: A, B, C, D, S, Y
